case_title: BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC. VS. SHARI TAYLOR

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-29-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $285.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100034154) AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SHARI

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SHARI $4,834.80 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,119.80, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKWOOD LOANS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, SHARI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-27-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-29-2018 CONTINUED TO OCT-16-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-29-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
